Production version will be integrated into      Beam's account abstraction layer via SDK updates.","kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_algorithm":"The PQ algorithm (0 = ML-DSA-65, 1 = SLH-DSA-128s)","_pubkey":"The PQ public key for this account"}},"derivePQAddress(bytes)":{"details":"Uses the same derivation as Ethereum but from PQ key material"},"execute(address,uint256,bytes,uint256,bytes)":{"params":{"_nonce":"Expected nonce (for replay protection)","data":"Calldata for the target","signature":"PQ signature over (target, value, data, nonce, chainId)","target":"The contract/address to call","value":"ETH/BEAM value to send"}}},"title":"PQAccount \u2014 Post-Quantum Smart Account (Proof of Concept)","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"derivePQAddress(bytes)":{"notice":"Derive an address from a PQ public key (keccak256 \u2192 last 20 bytes)"},"execute(address,uint256,bytes,uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Execute a transaction after verifying PQ signature"},"isValidSignature(bytes,bytes)":{"notice":"Check if a PQ signature is valid for a message"},"nonce()":{"notice":"Nonce for replay protection"},"owner()":{"notice":"Owner address (derived from PQ public key hash)"},"pqAlgorithm()":{"notice":"The algorithm used for this account's signatures"},"pqPublicKey()":{"notice":"The PQ public key that controls this account"}},"notice":"Minimal smart account that uses PQ signatures for transaction authorization.
